refactor_items.title: Remove --bpm static commander default
refactor_items.rationale: The static '120' in .option('--bpm', ..., '120') duplicates the ace_step registry entry and violates the registry-as-single-source-of-truth principle (FR-3 spirit).

changes.description: Remove static default from .option('--bpm <n>', 'Beats per minute', '120')
Apply registry default for bpm in the audio handler before passing to AudioOpts

refactor_items.title: Remove unreachable hardcoded fallback strings from handlers
refactor_items.rationale: The ternary fallbacks (e.g., '832', '480', '20') after the model-defaults expression are unreachable for registered models and silently mask future registry omissions.

changes.description: Add a guard in each handler that exits with a clear error if getModelDefaults returns undefined, then simplify the ?? expressions to use String(defaults.field) directly.
changes.example: if (!defaults) { console.error(`Error: no defaults for model '${opts.model}'. Update registry.ts.`); process.exit(1); }

refactor_items.title: (Optional UX) Add footnote for — cells in defaults table
refactor_items.rationale: ltx23 shows — for steps; users unfamiliar with omitSteps may be confused.

changes.description: In buildDefaultsTable, if any data cell equals '—', append a footnote line: '  (—) = parameter not applicable for this model'
